Request adding a device to a track by name.

Get all devices on the master track.
Get master track information (name, volume, pan, devices).

Enable or disable Back to Arrangement mode.

Set arrangement loop start position in beats.
Set a master track device parameter by index. Value is clamped to the parameter's min/max.

Set a master track device parameter by name. For quantized params pass a string from value_items (e.g. '4:1'). For continuous params pass a number (clamped to min/max). Matches first parameter with that name.

value.description: Display string for quantized params, or numeric string for continuous

Set session or arrangement record mode: 0=session, 1=arrangement.

Set the annotation text for a track.
Set a track's color using an Ableton color index.
Set a track's delay compensation in samples.
Set a track device parameter by index. Value is clamped to the parameter's min/max.

Set a track device parameter by name. For quantized params pass a string from value_items (e.g. '4:1'). For continuous params pass a number (clamped to min/max). Matches first parameter with that name.

value.description: Display string for quantized params, or numeric string for continuous

length.description: Recording length in beats; omit for open-ended
